marketingProduct.metaDescription: Product layers for construction: clients and projects, documents and AI scanning, billing, field ops and control.
marketingProduct.title: Work layers for a construction project — from proposal to supplier invoice.
marketingProduct.description: Each module follows the real field flow: client and site, documents and suppliers, payments and control — with AI that respects your profession settings.

clients.title: Clients & work relationships
clients.body: CRM that connects statuses, tasks, notes, progress and operational history.

docs.title: Smart documents
docs.body: Intake, scan, analyze, assign and create documents from business context.

finance.title: Finance & collections
finance.body: Cash flow hub, issued documents, ERP links and OS billing settings — separate from the AI screen.

ai.title: AI & insights
ai.body: One AI hub: recommendations, intelligence and a management snapshot tied to clients and documents.

operations.title: Operations & field
operations.body: Workflows, inbox and team tools aligned with construction projects.

marketingSolutions.metaDescription: Solutions for developers, contractors, supervisors and trades in construction — documents, cash and projects.
marketingSolutions.title: Same kind of work — fewer operational headaches.
marketingSolutions.description: BSD-YBM is built for construction load: many documents, many stakeholders, and one language between office and site.

items.title: Developers & project managers
items.body: One picture of sites, commitments, documents and payments — office and field aligned.

items.title: General contractors & construction firms
items.body: Manage clients, suppliers and subcontractors, invoices and costs — with project profitability insight.

items.title: Trades (electrical, plumbing, HVAC, finishing…)
items.body: Same CRM & documents backbone — AI tuned to your trade: quotes, invoices and site certificates.

items.title: Supervision, control and clients
items.body: Track approvals, exceptions and documentation — keep the project file in order.

marketingPricing.metaDescription: Subscription paths for construction businesses and trades — from small teams to multi-site organizations.
marketingPricing.title: Pricing by workload — from solo pro to construction company.
marketingPricing.description: Technical plans map to subscription tiers (including scan quotas). This is the marketing frame for construction; exact numbers appear after sign-in.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.body: For a pro or lean team that wants order across documents, clients and invoices without scattered spreadsheets.

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.body: For an active company with parallel projects — cash flow, roles and supplier tracking.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.body: For groups with multiple companies/sites, integrations and hands-on onboarding.

legalShell.disclaimerBody: The text below is a framework only and is not legal or tax advice. Validate with counsel before final publication.

aboutPage.shellDescription: BSD-YBM was born from the need to connect operations, clients, documents and billing in one workspace.

contactPage.shellDescription: Talk to us about a demo, org rollout or a workflow that fits your business.

professionalPage.metaDescription: Methodology, field notes and practical guidance for construction and professional services.
professionalPage.title: Professional insights
professionalPage.shellDescription: Short articles and operational notes—documents, clients and field work in one coherent flow.
professionalPage.body: We publish professional content here over time: workflow examples, product-layer context for construction trades, and ways teams reduce operational drag. Use Contact to suggest topics.

publicShell.footerLead: BSD-YBM is an intelligent operations system for businesses that want one clear picture of their work.
publicShell.authHeroTitle: One workspace, faster decisions, less manual load.
publicShell.authHeroLead: BSD-YBM connects operations, clients, documents, billing and AI so your team shares one business picture.
publicShell.authHighlight1: One system for clients, documents, billing and control
publicShell.authPanelTitle: Same product — a clear sign-in experience
publicShell.authPanelBody: Secure sign-in, full localized UI and the same visual language as the rest of the site—so you start fast without confusion.
publicShell.authFooterLead: Work from one state of truth—without splitting across tools.
